file.content:
.PHONY: install run test docker-up docker-down db-up db-down migrate make-migration init-db reset-db clean test-cov

install:
	pip install -r requirements.txt

run:
	source .venv/bin/activate && uvicorn app.main:app --reload

test:
	source .venv/bin/activate && pytest -v

docker-up:
	docker-compose up -d

docker-down:
	docker-compose down

db-up:
	docker-compose up -d db

db-down:
	docker-compose stop db

# 初始化数据库(创建表 + 种子数据)
init-db:
	source .venv/bin/activate && python -m app.init_db --init

# 重置数据库(删除所有数据并重新初始化)
reset-db:
	source .venv/bin/activate && CONFIRM_RESET=yes python -m app.init_db --reset

# 执行数据库迁移
migrate:
	source .venv/bin/activate && alembic upgrade head

# 生成新的迁移文件
make-migration:
	source .venv/bin/activate && alembic revision --autogenerate -m "$(msg)"

# 回滚迁移
downgrade:
	source .venv/bin/activate && alembic downgrade -1

# 查看迁移历史
history:
	source .venv/bin/activate && alembic history

# 运行测试并显示覆盖率
test-cov:
	source .venv/bin/activate && pytest --cov=app --cov-report=html --cov-report=term -v

# 清理临时文件
clean:
	find . -type d -name "__pycache__" -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
	find . -type f -name "*.pyc" -delete 2>/dev/null || true
	find . -type f -name "test_*.db" -delete 2>/dev/null || true
	rm -rf .pytest_cache htmlcov .coverage

input.content:
[project]
name = "patent-platform-backend"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Patent Platform — B2B SaaS for patent/trademark quotation management"
requires-python = ">=3.9"
dependencies = [
    "fastapi>=0.100.0",
    "uvicorn[standard]>=0.23.0",
    "pydantic>=2.0.0",
    "pydantic-settings>=2.0.0",
    "sqlalchemy>=2.0.0",
    "alembic>=1.11.0",
    "psycopg2-binary>=2.9.0",
    "python-jose[cryptography]>=3.3.0",
    "passlib[bcrypt]>=1.7.4",
    "python-multipart>=0.0.6",
    "python-dateutil>=2.8.0",
    "email-validator>=2.0.0",
    "docxtpl>=0.16.0",
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = [
    "pytest>=8.0.0",
    "pytest-asyncio>=0.21.0",
    "httpx>=0.24.0",
    "pytest-cov>=4.1.0",
    "requests>=2.31.0",
]

[tool.uv]
dev-dependencies = [
    "pytest>=8.0.0",
    "pytest-asyncio>=0.21.0",
    "httpx>=0.24.0",
    "pytest-cov>=4.1.0",
    "requests>=2.31.0",
]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
asyncio_mode = "auto"
testpaths = ["tests"]

input.content:
.PHONY: install run test docker-up docker-down db-up db-down migrate make-migration init-db reset-db clean test-cov downgrade history

install:
	uv sync --all-extras

run:
	uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload

test:
	uv run pytest -v

docker-up:
	docker-compose up -d

docker-down:
	docker-compose down

db-up:
	docker-compose up -d db

db-down:
	docker-compose stop db

# 初始化数据库(创建表 + 种子数据)
init-db:
	uv run python -m app.init_db --init

# 重置数据库(删除所有数据并重新初始化)
reset-db:
	uv run env CONFIRM_RESET=yes python -m app.init_db --reset

# 执行数据库迁移
migrate:
	uv run alembic upgrade head

# 生成新的迁移文件
make-migration:
	uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m "$(msg)"

# 回滚迁移
downgrade:
	uv run alembic downgrade -1

# 查看迁移历史
history:
	uv run alembic history

# 运行测试并显示覆盖率
test-cov:
	uv run pytest --cov=app --cov-report=html --cov-report=term -v

# 清理临时文件
clean:
	find . -type d -name "__pycache__" -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
	find . -type f -name "*.pyc" -delete 2>/dev/null || true
	find . -type f -name "test_*.db" -delete 2>/dev/null || true
	rm -rf .pytest_cache htmlcov .coverage

.PHONY: install run test docker-up docker-down db-up db-down migrate make-migration init-db reset-db clean test-cov

install:
	pip install -r requirements.txt

run:
	source .venv/bin/activate && uvicorn app.main:app --reload

test:
	source .venv/bin/activate && pytest -v

docker-up:
	docker-compose up -d

docker-down:
	docker-compose down

db-up:
	docker-compose up -d db

db-down:
	docker-compose stop db

# 初始化数据库(创建表 + 种子数据)
init-db:
	source .venv/bin/activate && python -m app.init_db --init

# 重置数据库(删除所有数据并重新初始化)
reset-db:
	source .venv/bin/activate && CONFIRM_RESET=yes python -m app.init_db --reset

# 执行数据库迁移
migrate:
	source .venv/bin/activate && alembic upgrade head

# 生成新的迁移文件
make-migration:
	source .venv/bin/activate && alembic revision --autogenerate -m "$(msg)"

# 回滚迁移
downgrade:
	source .venv/bin/activate && alembic downgrade -1

# 查看迁移历史
history:
	source .venv/bin/activate && alembic history

# 运行测试并显示覆盖率
test-cov:
	source .venv/bin/activate && pytest --cov=app --cov-report=html --cov-report=term -v

# 清理临时文件
clean:
	find . -type d -name "__pycache__" -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
	find . -type f -name "*.pyc" -delete 2>/dev/null || true
	find . -type f -name "test_*.db" -delete 2>/dev/null || true
	rm -rf .pytest_cache htmlcov .coverage

toolUseResult:
Error: Exit code 127
(eval):1: command not found: uv

content.text: `uv`가 설치되어 있지 않습니다. 먼저 설치가 필요합니다.

input.command: which uv 2>/dev/null || brew list uv 2>/dev/null || echo "uv not installed"

content.content:
uv not found
uv not installed

toolUseResult.stdout:
uv not found
uv not installed

content.text:
`uv`가 없습니다. 터미널에서 직접 설치해주세요:

```
! brew install uv
```

또는 공식 설치 스크립트:

```
! curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
```

설치 후 백엔드 디렉토리에서:

```bash
cd backend
make install   # uv sync --all-extras
```

---

지금 변경된 내용은:

**`pyproject.toml` (신규)** — 프로젝트 메타데이터 + 의존성 정의
- 메인 의존성과 개발 의존성(`[tool.uv] dev-dependencies`) 분리
- `pytest` 설정도 포함 (`asyncio_mode = "auto"`)

**`Makefile` (수정)** — 모든 명령어를 `uv run`으로 변경
- `source .venv/bin/activate &&` 제거
- `pip install -r requirements.txt` → `uv sync --all-extras`
- `reset-db`의 환경변수 전달도 `uv run env CONFIRM_RESET=yes ...`로 수정

`requirements.txt`는 그대로 유지했습니다 (Docker 빌드 등 다른 곳에서 참조할 수 있으므로). 불필요하면 제거해드릴 수 있습니다.

# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

Patent Platform — a B2B SaaS system for managing patent/trademark quotations, vendor costs, and pricing configuration. Built with FastAPI (Python) backend and React (TypeScript) frontend.

## Common Commands

### Backend (run from `/backend/`)

```bash
make install          # Install Python dependencies
make run              # Start dev server (http://localhost:8000, hot reload)
make init-db          # Initialize DB + seed data (admin/admin123)
make reset-db         # Full DB reset (destructive)
make migrate          # Apply pending Alembic migrations
make make-migration msg="description"  # Create new migration
make downgrade        # Rollback last migration
make test             # Run pytest
make test-cov         # Run pytest with HTML + terminal coverage report
```

### Frontend (run from `/frontend/`)

```bash
npm install           # Install dependencies
npm run dev           # Start dev server (http://localhost:5173)
npm run build         # TypeScript check + production build
npm run lint          # ESLint check
```

### Docker (from project root)

```bash
make docker-up        # Full stack (PostgreSQL + backend)
make db-up            # Database only
```

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

Patent Platform — a B2B SaaS system for managing patent/trademark quotations, vendor costs, and pricing configuration. Built with FastAPI (Python) backend and React (TypeScript) frontend.

## Common Commands

### Backend (run from `/backend/`)

```bash
make install          # Install Python dependencies
make run              # Start dev server (http://localhost:8000, hot reload)
make init-db          # Initialize DB + seed data (admin/admin123)
make reset-db         # Full DB reset (destructive)
make migrate          # Apply pending Alembic migrations
make make-migration msg="description"  # Create new migration
make downgrade        # Rollback last migration
make test             # Run pytest
make test-cov         # Run pytest with HTML + terminal coverage report
```

### Frontend (run from `/frontend/`)

```bash
npm install           # Install dependencies
npm run dev           # Start dev server (http://localhost:5173)
npm run build         # TypeScript check + production build
npm run lint          # ESLint check
```

### Docker (from project root)

```bash
make docker-up        # Full stack (PostgreSQL + backend)
make db-up            # Database only
```

## Architecture

### Stack

- **Backend**: FastAPI + SQLAlchemy 2.0 + Alembic + PostgreSQL (SQLite for dev) + PyJWT
- **Frontend**: React 19 + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui + Arco Design
- **State**: Zustand (client state) + TanStack Query (server state)
- **Forms**: React Hook Form + Zod validation
- **HTTP**: Axios

### Frontend API Mock Layer

The frontend has a toggleable mock/real API system via `VITE_USE_MOCK=true|false` in `.env.development`. This allows independent frontend development without the backend running. The `src/api/` directory provides a unified interface that routes to either mock handlers (MSW) or real axios calls.

### Backend Structure

```
backend/
  app/
    api/v1/         # Route handlers (auth, users, countries, vendors, quotations, etc.)
    models/         # SQLAlchemy ORM models
    schemas/        # Pydantic request/response schemas
    services/       # Business logic layer
    core/           # Config, security, database session
    migrations/     # Alembic migration files
```

### Frontend Structure

```
frontend/src/
  api/              # API client (mock + real implementations)
  components/       # Shared UI components
  pages/            # Route-level page components
  stores/           # Zustand state stores
  hooks/            # Custom React hooks
  types/            # TypeScript type definitions
  lib/              # Utilities
```

### Key Domain Models

- **Country / ExchangeRate** — Geographic and currency configuration
- **Vendor** — External patent/trademark agents
- **PatentVendorCost / TrademarkVendorCost** — What vendors charge (cost side)
- **PatentStandardPrice / TrademarkStandardPrice** — Platform pricing (price side); supports price books: `standard`, `vip`, `channel`, `channel_vip`
- **Quotation → QuotationProduct → QuotationProductStage → QuotationProductStageMiscFee** — Quote document hierarchy
- **MiscFee** — Add-on services attached to quotation stages

Patent phases: `filing`, `examination`, `grant`, `annuity`, `invalidation`, `restoration`
Trademark phases: `filing`, `registration`, `renewal`, `opposition`, `invalidation`
Entity types: `large`, `small`, `micro`, `unified`

## Environment Configuration

**Backend** — copy `.env.example` to `.env`:
- `DB_TYPE=sqlite` (dev) or `postgresql` (prod)
- `SECRET_KEY` — JWT signing key
- `CORS_ORIGINS` — allowed origins

**Frontend** — `.env.development` already exists:
- `VITE_USE_MOCK=true` — toggles mock API
- `VITE_API_BASE_URL` — backend URL when mock is off

## Database Migrations

Always create a migration after model changes:
```bash
make make-migration msg="describe the change"
make migrate
```

Migrations live in `backend/app/migrations/versions/`. The migration chain must remain unbroken — do not edit existing migration files.

## Frontend Code Conventions

- Prefer `unknown` with type narrowing over `any`
- Use Zustand for client/UI state; React Query for server data
- No derived state in `useEffect` — compute it during render
- Only pure component exports in `.tsx` files
- Tailwind CSS for all styling; use `cn()` (clsx + tailwind-merge) for conditional classes
- Add shadcn components via `npx shadcn@latest add <component>`

lines: +Dependencies are managed with [uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/). Install uv first: `brew install uv`
+make install          # uv sync (install all deps including dev)
make run              # Start dev server (http://localhost:8000, hot reload)
make init-db          # Initialize DB + seed data (admin/admin123)

content.text:
완료됐습니다. 변경 사항 요약:

- **`pyproject.toml`** 생성 — 의존성을 메인/dev로 분리, `[dependency-groups]` 표준 사용
- **`Makefile`** — 모든 명령어를 `uv run`으로 변경, `source .venv/...` 제거
- **`uv.lock`** 생성 — 재현 가능한 빌드를 위한 락파일
- **`CLAUDE.md`** — uv 사용 안내 추가

`requirements.txt`는 그대로 남겨뒀습니다. Docker 등에서 여전히 필요하면 유지하고, 필요 없으면 삭제해도 됩니다.

message.content: make里的命令如何使用 .venv 环境

content.text:
`uv run` 会自动检测项目目录下的 `.venv`，无需手动 `activate`。

具体机制：`uv run <cmd>` 等价于 `.venv/bin/<cmd>`，它在执行前自动将 `.venv/bin` 注入到 `PATH`。

验证一下：

```bash
# 这两个完全等价
uv run python -c "import sys; print(sys.executable)"
.venv/bin/python -c "import sys; print(sys.executable)"
```

所以 Makefile 里：

```makefile
run:
    uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload
# 实际执行的是 .venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --reload
```

如果你想在 shell 里交互式使用 `.venv`，还是需要手动激活：

```bash
# fish shell
source .venv/bin/activate.fish

# bash/zsh
source .venv/bin/activate
```

或者用 `uv` 提供的快捷方式：

```bash
uv shell   # 进入激活了 .venv 的子 shell
```

file.content:
"""
JWT Token 工具：生成和验证
"""
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, UTC
from jose import JWTError, jwt
from app.config import settings

def create_access_token(data: dict, expires_delta: timedelta = None):
    """
    创建 JWT access token
    
    Args:
        data: 要编码的数据（如 {"sub": username}）
        expires_delta: 过期时间（可选）
    
    Returns:
        编码后的 JWT token
    """
    to_encode = data.copy()
    if expires_delta:
        expire = datetime.now(UTC) + expires_delta
    else:
        expire = datetime.now(UTC) + timedelta(minutes=settings.ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES)
    
    to_encode.update({"exp": expire})
    encoded_jwt = jwt.encode(to_encode, settings.SECRET_KEY, algorithm=settings.ALGORITHM)
    return encoded_jwt

def decode_token(token: str):
    """
    解码并验证 JWT token
    
    Args:
        token: JWT token 字符串
        
    Returns:
        解码后的 payload，验证失败返回 None
    """
    try:
        payload = jwt.decode(token, settings.SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[settings.ALGORITHM])
        return payload
    except JWTError:
        return None

toolUseResult.originalFile:
"""
JWT Token 工具：生成和验证
"""
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, UTC
from jose import JWTError, jwt
from app.config import settings

def create_access_token(data: dict, expires_delta: timedelta = None):
    """
    创建 JWT access token
    
    Args:
        data: 要编码的数据（如 {"sub": username}）
        expires_delta: 过期时间（可选）
    
    Returns:
        编码后的 JWT token
    """
    to_encode = data.copy()
    if expires_delta:
        expire = datetime.now(UTC) + expires_delta
    else:
        expire = datetime.now(UTC) + timedelta(minutes=settings.ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES)
    
    to_encode.update({"exp": expire})
    encoded_jwt = jwt.encode(to_encode, settings.SECRET_KEY, algorithm=settings.ALGORITHM)
    return encoded_jwt

def decode_token(token: str):
    """
    解码并验证 JWT token
    
    Args:
        token: JWT token 字符串
        
    Returns:
        解码后的 payload，验证失败返回 None
    """
    try:
        payload = jwt.decode(token, settings.SECRET_KEY, algorithms=[settings.ALGORITHM])
        return payload
    except JWTError:
        return None
